title: trisetum flavescens var. capillaceum
intro: Trisetum flavescens var. capillaceum, also known as tall oat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Trisetum flavescens var. capillaceum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from minor skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be applied topically to the skin or used internally to promote overall health and well-being.
